title: Arachnorchis longicauda
taxonomy: Arachnorchis longicauda is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the Orchidaceae family, it is further classified under the genus Arachnorchis. Arachnorchis longicauda is native to Australia, specifically in the states of New South Wales and Queensland. The classification of this orchid species is consistent with the APG III system.
uses: Arachnorchis longicauda has been traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine. However, specific information on its medicinal uses is limited.
